action: Review every live deal with no next action due today or overdue.
output: Updated stage, probability, expected fee, close month and next action.
acceptanceCriteria: 100% of live opportunities have owner, stage, probability, close month and next action date.
metric: Live weighted facility value and expected 1% fee.

action: Call every new qualified lead during business hours within 15 minutes.
output: Call logged, qualification noted, core document request sent if viable.
acceptanceCriteria: No qualified lead waits longer than 15 minutes during business hours.

action: Add 50 named introducer prospects and send 50 first-touch partner emails.
output: Named prospects with company, role, email/LinkedIn, category and first-touch date.
acceptanceCriteria: 50 first touches, 100 follow-ups, 8 calls booked and 2 partner-agreed outcomes per week.
metric: Active introducers; referred facility pipeline per month.

action: Run eight introducer calls focused on planning consultants, architects and solicitors.
output: Partner fit scored, referral fee terms discussed, next referral ask agreed.
acceptanceCriteria: At least two firms move to partner_agreed or first_referral stage each week.

action: Send a practical market briefing to all active and warm introducers.
output: One forwardable email with rate note, lender appetite and recent planning/site insight.
acceptanceCriteria: Briefing sent weekly; replies and referral prompts logged against each partner.

action: Run planning scrape, QA approvals, generate site articles and export outreach records.
output: Approved-site records with article URL, applicant/company, agent and funding estimate.
acceptanceCriteria: False positives below 10%; all viable records have source URL, article URL and contact path.
metric: Planning prospects, conversations and new facility pipeline.

action: Send email plus letter to every planning prospect above threshold.
output: Outreach logged with article link, sold-price evidence and 70% LTGDV estimate.
acceptanceCriteria: 100+ planning-triggered prospects per month and 30 direct conversations.

action: Brief or publish 10 P1 commercial pages from content-sprint.csv.
output: Page with CTA, examples, terms, lender objections, checklist and internal links.
acceptanceCriteria: No page ships without direct finance CTA and CRM source tracking.
metric: Published P1 pages; assisted leads; ranking movement.

action: Work 25 P1 link prospects from link-sprint.csv.
output: Prospect classified, first email sent, two follow-ups scheduled, status logged.
acceptanceCriteria: Junk directories and scraped profiles excluded; 20 quality links/month target maintained.
metric: Quality links acquired; editorial links; partner links.

output: 9:16, 1:1 and 16:9 variants with captions, one CTA and matching page/link.
acceptanceCriteria: Every planning article above threshold gets a short video; every video points to one CTA.
metric: Videos published; views; clicks to deal-room/introducers.

action: Create one co-branded or white-label funding note for a warm introducer.
output: PDF/article/email asset they can forward to developer clients.
acceptanceCriteria: At least two partner-specific assets created per month for high-potential introducers.
metric: Introducer asset sends and referrals generated.

action: Run 45-minute revenue meeting from the dashboard.
output: Pipeline deltas, stuck deals, lead source performance and this week's targets.
acceptanceCriteria: Every stuck qualified deal has a blocker, owner and unlock action.

action: Review wins, losses, stuck deals and partner/referral movement.
output: Lost reasons logged and next week's priority targets confirmed.
acceptanceCriteria: Every lost or stuck deal has a reason that can improve packaging, targeting or lender routing.
metric: Win rate, lost reasons, stuck-deal age.

action: Review capacity triggers for packaging/admin, originator and partnerships support.
output: Hire/no-hire decision based on live pipeline, response times and overdue tasks.
acceptanceCriteria: Hire support when qualified pipeline exceeds capacity or SLA compliance falls below target.
metric: Open tasks per owner; response SLA; qualified pipeline per originator.
